experience.position: Senior Software Engineer, AI Platform Ops
achievements: Engineered and scaled an internal AI platform supporting 500+ production workflows, processing ~18K automated executions monthly (~1.13M lifetime) across product, regulatory compliance, and agent orchestration.
Accelerated delivery of 10 automation epics across 6 business units, resolving 100+ tickets with a 62% same-day resolution rate and turnaround 43% below team baseline.
Architected guardrail middleware for LLM content filtering and policy enforcement, achieving 100% uptime during a 437-participant AI hackathon via automated deactivation logic.

Streamlined internal AI/Automation onboarding by building a self-service provisioning layer (AWS Bedrock, LiteLLM), reducing setup time from days to minutes and enabling 4.6x growth in monthly throughput.
Spearheaded research programs (MaxDiff, CSAT, mixed-methods) on platform health, deposits, and responsible gaming, with findings directly informing VP-level roadmap decisions.
Translated complex behavioral and risk insights to develop the "My Stat Sheet" feature, adopted by 13M+ users and achieving 30% engagement in year one.
Collaborated cross-functionally with Engineering, Design, and Product to ensure requirements traceability and evidence-based decision-making throughout the product lifecycle.
Built a continuous product intelligence workflow using session replays and quantified behavioral signals, accelerating decision-making for teams building customer-facing financial tools.
Architected a multi-system web infrastructure and redesigned the digital journey for a venue serving 20k+ monthly visitors, using multi-method research to optimize user flow.
Executed end-to-end product design for SMBs and non-profits, translating research into technical specs and flows that drove a 46% increase in patient bookings.
Directed the full delivery lifecycle across diverse client portfolios, ensuring rigorous technical feasibility and on-time implementation.
